[IMΛGΣ BY 661ΛVΣ](https://ave661.tumblr.com/post/723297366280749056/ok-so-ive-been-thinking-about-doing-this-for-a)
---
honestly, the fact that he had even agreed to something like this was baffling in itself. but it was hard to deny you.
especially since all day long, throughout the entire goddamn month of december, you'd been nagging, begging, and practically grovelling at simon's feet with those goddamn puppy dog eyes, asking him to be your christmas present.
 ❝ ＲＥＱ：＠ＡＮＯＮ ❞
